extraction.one_line_summary: CICCONI Giulio won summit finish at Vall Ter 2000 after CHAVES Jhon attacked viciously on climb, with ROGLIC still leading GC.
tactical_patterns: BAHRAIN Victorious paced entire climb for LANDA who then couldn't finish, revealing their leader domestique imbalance problem.
CHAVES attacked solo on steep gradients then sat up to pace ROGLIC, demonstrating team order sacrifice pattern.
ROGLIC attacked first among GC favorites at 500m, forcing EVENEPOEL wide on final corner which decided podium.

rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Bahrain burned entire team pacing for him on Vall Ter 2000 climb but he could only manage fourth
rider_signals.CHAVES Jhon: positive: attacked so violently on climb he distanced everyone, then sacrificed own result to pace Roglic back
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: went too wide on final corner before finish losing podium to Cicconi despite strong climbing
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Ecuadorian champion dropped badly on Vall Ter 2000 despite being protected rider
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: fastest rider up much of mountain, finished fifth at only 27 seconds despite less GC protection
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: positive: did sensational pacing work for Bahrain on 2135m altitude climb showing high-altitude strength
rider_signals.CICCONI Giulio: positive: positioned perfectly on Roglic wheel to outsprint final corner after Trek lost both Cataldo and Elissonde
